async fn handle_upload(data: Vec<u8>) -> String {
    let parsed = std::str::from_utf8(&data).unwrap();
    let count = parsed.lines().count();
    let sorted: Vec<&str> = {
        let mut v: Vec<&str> = parsed.lines().collect();
        v.sort();
        v
    };
    format!("sorted {count} lines, first: {}", sorted[0])
}

async fn fetch_and_process(url: &str) -> String {
    let body = reqwest::blocking::get(url).unwrap().text().unwrap();
    let lines: Vec<&str> = body.lines().collect();
    format!("got {} lines", lines.len())
}

async fn log_to_file(path: &str, msg: &str) {
    use std::io::Write;
    let mut f = std::fs::OpenOptions::new()
        .create(true)
        .append(true)
        .open(path)
        .unwrap();
    writeln!(f, "{msg}").unwrap();
}
